calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Off Calendar

Mtn For Default Prove-Up Hrg; Brief
Off Calendar Sep-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ksenia Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sarah Lerschen #6213.
William Webb, Esq. appeared for and with the plaintiff Anthony Lowenstein, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendant David B. Prince.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages $10,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $5,930.96
Costs $571.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $15,930.96
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2012 Continued To Nov-06-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
